   778→async def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   779→    """Try to extract profile URL for a candidate from the DOM contactcard pattern.
   780→
   781→    Searches the current page for a contactcard element whose parent card
   782→    contains the candidate's name (and optionally company), then constructs
   783→    the profile URL from the extracted user ID.
   784→
   785→    Args:
   786→        page: Playwright page on the search results
   787→        name: Candidate name to match
   788→        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   789→
   790→    Returns:
   791→        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   792→    """
   793→    try:
   794→        user_id = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   795→            const { name, company } = args;
   796→            // Check contactcard_{numeric_id} ancestors
   797→            const ccElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   798→            for (const el of ccElements) {
   799→                const text = el.textContent || '';
   800→                if (!text.includes(name)) continue;
   801→                if (company && !text.includes(company)) continue;
   802→                const match = el.id.match(/^contactcard_(\\d+)$/);
   803→                if (match) return match[1];
   804→            }
   805→            // Check member_entry_{numeric_id} descendants
   806→            const meElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   807→            for (const el of meElements) {
   808→                // Walk up to find the card containing this member_entry
   809→                let card = el.parentElement;
   810→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   811→                    const text = card.textContent || '';
   812→                    if (text.includes(name) && (!company || text.includes(company))) {
   813→                        const match = el.id.match(/^member_entry_(\\d+)$/);
   814→                        if (match) return match[1];
   815→                    }
   816→                    card = card.parentElement;
   817→                }
   818→            }
   819→            return null;
   820→        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   821→
   822→        if user_id:
   823→            profile_url = f"https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{user_id}?dstu={user_id}"
   824→            logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{name}' via contactcard: {profile_url}")
   825→            return profile_url
   826→
   827→        logger.debug(f"No contactcard found for '{name}'")
   828→        return None
   829→
   830→    except Exception as e:
   831→        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   832→        return None
   833→
   834→
   835→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   836→# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   837→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   838→
   839→MAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   840→ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"
   841→
   842→
   843→async def search_candidates_enterprise(
   844→    keywords: str,
   845→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   846→    pages: int = 1,
   847→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   848→    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   849→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   850→    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   851→
   852→    Flow:
   853→    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "招聘" tab (opens new tab)
   854→    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   855→    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   856→    4. Optionally add company filter
   857→    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   858→    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   859→    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   860→
   861→    Args:
   862→        keywords: Search keywords
   863→        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   864→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
   865→        browser: Browser manager instance
   866→        keep_tab_open: If True, leave enterprise tab open (for inline messaging)
   867→
   868→    Returns:
   869→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   870→    """
   871→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   872→
   873→    if browser is None:
   874→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   875→
   876→    config = get_config()
   877→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   878→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   879→
   880→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   881→
   882→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   883→    enterprise_tab_opened = False
   884→
   885→    with Progress(
   886→        SpinnerColumn(),
   887→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   888→        console=console,
   889→    ) as progress:
   890→        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)
   891→
   892→        try:
   893→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
   894→
   895→            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
   896→            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
   897→            page = browser.page
   898→
   899→            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click 招聘 tab
   900→            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   901→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
   902→
   903→            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
   904→            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
   905→            if not recruitment_tab:
   906→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")
   907→
   908→            # Click opens a new tab — use BrowserManager API
   909→            await recruitment_tab.click()
   910→            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
   911→            enterprise_tab_opened = True
   912→
   913→            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")
   914→
   915→            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
   916→            try:
   917→                await page.wait_for_url(
   918→                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
   919→                    timeout=15000,
   920→                )
   921→            except Exception:
   922→                logger.warning(f"Enterprise URL marker not found, current URL: {page.url}")
   923→
   924→            await async_random_delay("action")
   925→
   926→            # Step 2: Add keyword
   927→            progress.update(task, description=f"Adding keyword: {keywords}")
   928→
   929→            add_kw_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_keyword_button")
   930→            add_kw_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_kw_sel, timeout=5000)
   931→            if add_kw_btn:
   932→                await add_kw_btn.click()
   933→                await async_random_delay("action")
   934→
   935→            kw_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_input")
   936→            await page.wait_for_selector(kw_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   937→            await human_type(page, kw_input_sel, keywords)
   938→            await async_random_delay("action")
   939→
   940→            kw_submit_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_submit")
   941→            submit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(kw_submit_sel, timeout=3000)
   942→            if submit_btn:
   943→                await submit_btn.click()
   944→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
   945→
   946→            # Step 3: Add company filter if specified
   947→            if company:
   948→                progress.update(task, description="Adding company filter...")
   949→                add_co_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_company_button")
   950→                add_co_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_co_sel, timeout=5000)
   951→                if add_co_btn:
   952→                    await add_co_btn.click()
   953→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   954→
   955→                co_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.company_input")
   956→                for co_name in company:
   957→                    await page.wait_for_selector(co_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   958→                    await human_type(page, co_input_sel, co_name)
   959→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   960→
   961→                    # Click suggestion dropdown item
   962→                    try:
   963→                        suggestion = await page.wait_for_selector(
   964→                            f"text='{co_name}'", timeout=3000
   965→                        )
   966→                        if suggestion:
   967→                            await suggestion.click()
   968→                            await async_random_delay("action")
   969→                    except Exception:
   970→                        logger.debug(f"Company suggestion not found for: {co_name}")
   971→
   972→            # Step 4: Wait for results and extract
   973→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   974→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   975→
   976→            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
   977→                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
   978→
   979→                candidates = await _extract_enterprise_results(page)
   980→
   981→                if not candidates:
   982→                    logger.info(f"No enterprise results on page {page_num}")
   983→                    break
   984→
   985→                # Filter non-R&D roles
   986→                before_filter = len(candidates)
   987→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   988→                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
   989→                if filtered > 0:
   990→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   991→
   992→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   993→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   994→
   995→                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
   996→                    "keywords": keywords,
   997→                    "page": page_num,
   998→                    "results": len(candidates),
   999→                    "mode": "enterprise",
  1000→                })
  1001→
  1002→                try:
  1003→                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
  1004→                except Exception as e:
  1005→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")
  1006→
  1007→                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
  1008→                if page_num < pages:
  1009→                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
  1010→                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1011→                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
  1012→
  1013→        except Exception as e:
  1014→            logger.error(f"Enterprise search error: {e}")
  1015→            await browser.screenshot("enterprise_search_error")
  1016→            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
  1017→        finally:
  1018→            # Close the enterprise tab unless caller wants it open for inline messaging
  1019→            if enterprise_tab_opened and not keep_tab_open:
  1020→                try:
  1021→                    await browser.close_current_tab()
  1022→                except Exception:
  1023→                    pass  # Best-effort cleanup; tab may already be closed
  1024→
  1025→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
  1026→
  1027→    console.print(f"[green]Enterprise search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
  1028→    return all_candidates
  1029→
  1030→
  1031→async def _extract_enterprise_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1032→    """Extract candidate information from enterprise recruitment results page.
  1033→
  1034→    The enterprise UI has a different card layout from search_center.
  1035→    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the enterprise talent cards.
  1036→
  1037→    Args:
  1038→        page: Playwright page instance on the enterprise results page
  1039→
  1040→    Returns:
  1041→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1042→    """
  1043→    candidates = []
  1044→
  1045→    try:
  1046→        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
  1047→    except Exception:
  1048→        pass  # Continue even if networkidle times out
  1049→
  1050→    try:
  1051→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1052→            const candidates = [];
  1053→            const seenIds = new Set();
  1054→
  1055→            // Enterprise talent cards typically have a structured layout
  1056→            // Try multiple selectors for the card containers
  1057→            const cardSelectors = [
  1058→                '[class*="talent-card"]',
  1059→                '[class*="candidate-card"]',
  1060→                '[class*="recommend-card"]',
  1061→                '[class*="talent-item"]',
  1062→                '[class*="card-wrap"]',
  1063→            ];
  1064→
  1065→            let cards = [];
  1066→            for (const sel of cardSelectors) {
  1067→                cards = document.querySelectorAll(sel);
  1068→                if (cards.length > 0) break;
  1069→            }
  1070→
  1071→            // Fallback: find cards by avatar image pattern (same as search_center)
  1072→            if (cards.length === 0) {
  1073→                const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
  1074→                const foundCards = [];
  1075→
  1076→                for (const img of images) {
  1077→                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
  1078→                    if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
  1079→                    if (rect.width < 30 || rect.height < 30) continue;
  1080→
  1081→                    let card = img.parentElement;
  1082→                    for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1083→                        const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1084→                        if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 80) {
  1085→                            break;
  1086→                        }
  1087→                        card = card.parentElement;
  1088→                    }
  1089→                    if (card) foundCards.push(card);
  1090→                }
  1091→                cards = foundCards;
  1092→            }
  1093→
  1094→            for (const card of cards) {
  1095→                const textParts = [];
  1096→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1097→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1098→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1099→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
  1100→                        textParts.push(text);
  1101→                    }
  1102→                }
  1103→
  1104→                let name = '';
  1105→                let company = '';
  1106→                let title = '';
  1107→
  1108→                const skipPatterns = [
  1109→                    /^立即沟通$/,
  1110→                    /^不合适$/,
  1111→                    /^感兴趣$/,
  1112→                    /^不感兴趣$/,
  1113→                    /^(\\d+\\s*)?年/,
  1114→                    /^[|｜·]$/,
  1115→                    /^在线|^离线|^活跃/,
  1116→                    /^今日活跃$/,
  1117→                    /^北京$|^上海$|^深圳$|^广州$|^杭州$/,
  1118→                    /^本科$|^硕士$|^博士$|^男$|^女$/,
  1119→                ];
  1120→
  1121→                const isSkippable = (text) => {
  1122→                    return skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text));
  1123→                };
  1124→
  1125→                // Name-like: CJK/letters, 1-15 chars (allow 1 for "c" etc.)
  1126→                const isNameLike = (t) => t.length >= 1 && t.length <= 15 && /^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\\s]+$/.test(t);
  1127→                // Prefer display name (Latin nickname) over real name that appears first in DOM
  1128→                const nameCandidates = [];
  1129→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1130→                    const part = textParts[i];
  1131→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1132→                    if (isNameLike(part)) nameCandidates.push(part);
  1133→                }
  1134→                // Drop 男/女 and location/degree so they are not used as name
  1135→                const nameCandidatesFiltered = nameCandidates.filter(t => !/^[男女]$/.test(t) && !/^(北京|上海|深圳|广州|杭州|本科|硕士|博士|今日活跃)$/.test(t));
  1136→                // Prefer Latin-only (display name in chat, e.g. c, Louis) over CJK real name
  1137→                const latinOnly = nameCandidatesFiltered.find(t => /^[a-zA-Z\\s]+$/.test(t));
  1138→                name = latinOnly || nameCandidatesFiltered[0] || '';
  1139→
  1140→                // Company & title: first non-name-like parts after we have a name
  1141→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1142→                    const part = textParts[i];
  1143→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1144→                    if (part === name) continue;
  1145→                    if (!company && part.length > 1) {
  1146→                        company = part;
  1147→                        continue;
  1148→                    }
  1149→                    if (company && !title && part.length > 1) {
  1150→                        title = part;
  1151→                        break;
  1152→                    }
  1153→                }
  1154→
  1155→                if (!name) continue;
  1156→
  1157→                // Use first name candidate for stable ID (consistent with historical hashing)
  1158→                const idName = nameCandidatesFiltered[0] || nameCandidates[0] || name;
  1159→                const idSource = (idName || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
  1160→                let hash = 0;
  1161→                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
  1162→                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
  1163→                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
  1164→                    hash = hash & hash;
  1165→                }
  1166→                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
  1167→
  1168→                if (seenIds.has(maimaiId)) continue;
  1169→                seenIds.add(maimaiId);
  1170→
  1171→                // Try to extract profile URL
  1172→                let profileUrl = '';
  1173→                const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
  1174→                for (const link of links) {
  1175→                    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  1176→                    if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('dstu=') || href.includes('egid=')) {
  1177→                        profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
  1178→                        break;
  1179→                    }
  1180→                }
  1181→
  1182→                candidates.push({
  1183→                    name: name,
  1184→                    title: title || '',
  1185→                    company: company || '',
  1186→                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
  1187→                    profile_url: profileUrl,
  1188→                    location: '',
  1189→                });
  1190→            }
  1191→
  1192→            return candidates;
  1193→        }''')
  1194→
  1195→        logger.info(f"Enterprise extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
  1196→
  1197→        for data in candidates_data:
  1198→            if data.get("name"):
  1199→                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
  1200→                    maimai_id=data.get("maimai_id", ""),
  1201→                    name=data.get("name", ""),
  1202→                    title=data.get("title", ""),
  1203→                    company=data.get("company", ""),
  1204→                    location=data.get("location", ""),
  1205→                    profile_url=data.get("profile_url", ""),
  1206→                ))
  1207→
  1208→        # Filter out premium placeholders
  1209→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
  1210→
  1211→        logger.info(f"Enterprise: extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
  1212→
  1213→    except Exception as e:
  1214→        logger.error(f"Error extracting enterprise results: {e}")
  1215→
  1216→    return candidates
  1217→
  1218→
  1219→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1220→# Talent Bank recruitment path (Path C)
  1221→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1222→
  1223→TALENT_BANK_ENTRY_URL = "https://maimai.cn/ent/v41/index"
  1224→
  1225→
  1226→async def search_candidates_talent_bank(
  1227→    keywords: str,
  1228→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
  1229→    pages: int = 1,
  1230→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
  1231→    min_years: Optional[int] = None,
  1232→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1233→    """Search for candidates via the talent bank path.
  1234→
  1235→    Unlike enterprise search which opens a new tab, talent bank navigates
  1236→    the current tab in-place.  No tab cleanup is needed.
  1237→
  1238→    Flow:
  1239→    1. Navigate to enterprise entry -> click "招人" -> click "搜索" tab
  1240→    2. Input keywords in search box -> Enter
  1241→    3. Extract candidates from results
  1242→    4. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
  1243→
  1244→    Args:
  1245→        keywords: Search keywords
  1246→        company: Filter by company names (optional)
  1247→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
  1248→        browser: Browser manager instance
  1249→
  1250→    Returns:
  1251→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1252→    """
  1253→    validate_keywords(keywords)
  1254→
  1255→    if browser is None:
  1256→        browser = get_browser_manager()
  1257→
  1258→    config = get_config()
  1259→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
  1260→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
  1261→
  1262→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
  1263→
  1264→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
  1265→    seen_ids: set = set()
  1266→
  1267→    with Progress(
  1268→        SpinnerColumn(),
  1269→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
  1270→        console=console,
  1271→    ) as progress:
  1272→        task = progress.add_task("Opening talent bank...", total=None)
  1273→
  1274→        try:
  1275→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
  1276→
  1277→            page = browser.page
  1278→
  1279→            # Step 1: Navigate to talent bank entry
  1280→            progress.update(task, description="Navigating to talent bank...")
  1281→            await retry_navigation(page, TALENT_BANK_ENTRY_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
  1282→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1283→
  1284→            # Click "招人" to enter talent bank
  1285→            entry_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.entry_button")
  1286→            entry_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(entry_sel, timeout=8000)
  1287→            if not entry_btn:
  1288→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find talent bank entry: {entry_sel}")
  1289→            await entry_btn.click()
  1290→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1291→
  1292→            # Wait for talent bank URL
  1293→            try:
  1294→                await page.wait_for_url(
  1295→                    lambda url: "recruit/talents" in url,
  1296→                    timeout=15000,
  1297→                )
  1298→            except Exception:
  1299→                logger.warning(f"Talent bank URL not matched, current: {page.url}")
  1300→
  1301→            # Click "搜索" tab
  1302→            search_tab_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.search_tab")
  1303→            search_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(search_tab_sel, timeout=5000)
  1304→            if search_tab:
  1305→                await search_tab.click()
  1306→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1307→
  1308→            # Step 1.5: Set work years filter if requested
  1309→            if min_years:
  1310→                progress.update(task, description=f"Setting year filter: {min_years}+...")
  1311→                try:
  1312→                    year_filter = await page.wait_for_selector("text=工作年限", timeout=5000)
  1313→                    if year_filter:
  1314→                        await year_filter.click()
  1315→                        await async_random_delay("action")
  1316→                        # Map min_years to dropdown option
  1317→                        if min_years >= 10:
  1318→                            option_text = "10年以上"
  1319→                        elif min_years >= 5:
  1320→                            option_text = "5-10年"
  1321→                        elif min_years >= 3:
  1322→                            option_text = "3-5年"
  1323→                        else:
  1324→                            option_text = "1-3年"
  1325→                        opt = await page.wait_for_selector(f"text={option_text}", timeout=3000)
  1326→                        if opt:
  1327→                            await opt.click()
  1328→                            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1329→                            logger.info(f"Set work years filter: {option_text}")
  1330→                except Exception as e:
  1331→                    logger.warning(f"Failed to set year filter: {e}")
  1332→
  1333→            # Step 2: Input keywords and search
  1334→            progress.update(task, description=f"Searching: {keywords}")
  1335→
  1336→            search_input_sel = config.get_selector("talent_bank.search_input")
  1337→            await page.wait_for_selector(search_input_sel, timeout=8000)
  1338→            await human_type(page, search_input_sel, keywords)
  1339→            await async_random_delay("action")
  1340→            await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
  1341→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1342→
  1343→            # Wait for results to load
  1344→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
  1345→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
  1346→
  1347→            # Step 3: Extract candidates (with pagination via scroll)
  1348→            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
  1349→                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
  1350→
  1351→                candidates = await _extract_talent_bank_results(page)
  1352→
  1353→                # Deduplicate across scroll pages
  1354→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
  1355→                for c in candidates:
  1356→                    seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
  1357→
  1358→                if not candidates:
  1359→                    logger.info(f"No talent bank results on page {page_num}")
  1360→                    break
  1361→
  1362→                # Filter non-R&D roles
  1363→                before_filter = len(candidates)
  1364→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
  1365→                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
  1366→                if filtered > 0:
  1367→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
  1368→
  1369→                # Apply company filter if specified
  1370→                if company:
  1371→                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
  1372→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.company and any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
  1373→
  1374→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
  1375→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
  1376→
  1377→                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
  1378→                    "keywords": keywords,
  1379→                    "page": page_num,
  1380→                    "results": len(candidates),
  1381→                    "mode": "talent_bank",
  1382→                })
  1383→
  1384→                try:
  1385→                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
  1386→                except Exception as e:
  1387→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")
  1388→
  1389→                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
  1390→                if page_num < pages:
  1391→                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
  1392→                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1393→                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
  1394→
  1395→        except Exception as e:
  1396→            logger.error(f"Talent bank search error: {e}")
  1397→            await browser.screenshot("talent_bank_search_error")
  1398→            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
  1399→
  1400→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
  1401→
  1402→    console.print(f"[green]Talent bank search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
  1403→    return all_candidates

  1406→async def _extract_talent_bank_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1407→    """Extract candidate information from talent bank results page.
  1408→
  1409→    The talent bank UI uses the same enterprise card layout.
  1410→    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the talent bank cards.
  1411→
  1412→    Args:
  1413→        page: Playwright page instance on the talent bank results page
  1414→
  1415→    Returns:
  1416→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1417→    """
  1418→    candidates = []
  1419→
  1420→    try:
  1421→        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
  1422→    except Exception:
  1423→        pass
  1424→
  1425→    try:
  1426→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1427→            const candidates = [];
  1428→            const seenIds = new Set();
  1429→
  1430→            // Find cards by "立即沟通" button proximity
  1431→            const chatBtns = [...document.querySelectorAll('[class*="btn"]')].filter(
  1432→                b => b.textContent?.trim() === '立即沟通'
  1433→            );
  1434→            const foundCards = new Set();
  1435→            for (const btn of chatBtns) {
  1436→                let card = btn.parentElement;
  1437→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1438→                    const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1439→                    if (rect.width > 200 && rect.height > 80) break;
  1440→                    card = card.parentElement;
  1441→                }
  1442→                if (card) foundCards.add(card);
  1443→            }
  1444→            const cards = Array.from(foundCards);
  1445→
  1446→            for (const card of cards) {
  1447→                // Extract structured data using class-based selectors
  1448→                // Name: bold span (font-weight-bold color-stress)
  1449→                const nameEl = card.querySelector('[class*="font-weight-bold"][class*="color-stress"]');
  1450→                const name = nameEl?.textContent?.trim() || '';
  1451→                if (!name) continue;
  1452→
  1453→                // Collect all text nodes with parent info
  1454→                const nodes = [];
  1455→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1456→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1457→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1458→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 200) {
  1459→                        nodes.push({
  1460→                            text,
  1461→                            cls: walker.currentNode.parentElement?.className || '',
  1462→                            tag: walker.currentNode.parentElement?.tagName || '',
  1463→                        });
  1464→                    }
  1465→                }
  1466→
  1467→                // Years of experience: "N年" pattern
  1468→                let years = '';
  1469→                for (const n of nodes) {
  1470→                    if (/^\d+年$/.test(n.text)) { years = n.text; break; }
  1471→                }
  1472→
  1473→                // Location: from demographic spans (after years, before 期望)
  1474→                let location = '';
  1475→                for (const n of nodes) {
  1476→                    // Location pattern: Chinese city/district names
  1477→                    if (/^[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2,8}$/.test(n.text) &&
  1478→                        !n.cls.includes('font-weight-bold') &&
  1479→                        !n.cls.includes('tag___') &&
  1480→                        !n.cls.includes('occTag') &&
  1481→                        !/^(本科|硕士|博士|大专|MBA|EMBA)$/.test(n.text) &&
  1482→                        !/^(在线|离线|急求职|今日活跃|立即沟通|不合适|发送后继续沟通)$/.test(n.text)) {
  1483→                        // Check if this looks like a location (has district suffix or province+city)
  1484→                        if (/[区市省县]$/.test(n.text) || /^(北京|上海|广东|浙江|江苏|四川|湖北|安徽|福建|天津|重庆)/.test(n.text)) {
  1485→                            location = n.text;
  1486→                            break;
  1487→                        }
  1488→                    }
  1489→                }
  1490→
  1491→                // Company & title: from work experience section
  1492→                // Pattern: date_start + date_end + company + · + title
  1493→                let company = '';
  1494→                let title = '';
  1495→                const datePattern = /^\d{4}\.\d{1,2}$/;
  1496→                for (let i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
  1497→                    if (datePattern.test(nodes[i].text) && nodes[i].cls.includes('min-w-')) {
  1498→                        // Found a date range start, skip date nodes
  1499→                        let j = i + 1;
  1500→                        // Skip "- 至今" or "- 2024.06"
  1501→                        while (j < nodes.length && (nodes[j].text === '-' || nodes[j].text.startsWith('- ') || datePattern.test(nodes[j].text))) {
  1502→                            j++;
  1503→                        }
  1504→                        // Next non-separator text is company
  1505→                        if (j < nodes.length && nodes[j].text !== '·') {
  1506→                            company = nodes[j].text;
  1507→                            // Look for title after separator
  1508→                            for (let k = j + 1; k < nodes.length && k <= j + 5; k++) {
  1509→                                if (nodes[k].text === '·') continue;
  1510→                                if (/^\d{4}\.\d{1,2}$/.test(nodes[k].text)) break;
  1511→                                // Collect title parts (may be split by search highlights)
  1512→                                const titleParts = [];
  1513→                                for (let m = k; m < nodes.length && m <= k + 4; m++) {
  1514→                                    if (nodes[m].text === '·' || /^\d{4}\.\d{1,2}$/.test(nodes[m].text)) break;
  1515→                                    if (/至今/.test(nodes[m].text) || nodes[m].cls.includes('min-w-')) break;
  1516→                                    if (nodes[m].tag === 'MARK' || nodes[m].tag === 'SPAN') {
  1517→                                        titleParts.push(nodes[m].text);
  1518→                                    } else break;
  1519→                                }
  1520→                                title = titleParts.join('');
  1521→                                if (title.length > 30) title = title.substring(0, 30);
  1522→                                break;
  1523→                            }
  1524→                            break;  // Use first (most recent) work experience
  1525→                        }
  1526→                    }
  1527→                }
  1528→
  1529→                // ID generation
  1530→                const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
  1531→                let hash = 0;
  1532→                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
  1533→                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
  1534→                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
  1535→                    hash = hash & hash;
  1536→                }
  1537→                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
  1538→                if (seenIds.has(maimaiId)) continue;
  1539→                seenIds.add(maimaiId);
  1540→
  1541→                // Profile URL
  1542→                let profileUrl = '';
  1543→                const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
  1544→                for (const link of links) {
  1545→                    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  1546→                    if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('dstu=') || href.includes('egid=')) {
  1547→                        profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
  1548→                        break;
  1549→                    }
  1550→                }
  1551→
  1552→                candidates.push({
  1553→                    name, title: title || '', company: company || '',
  1554→                    maimai_id: maimaiId, profile_url: profileUrl,
  1555→                    location: location || '', years: years || '',
  1556→                });
  1557→            }
  1558→
  1559→            return candidates;
  1560→        }''')
  1561→
  1562→        logger.info(f"Talent bank extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
  1563→
  1564→        for data in candidates_data:
  1565→            if data.get("name"):
  1566→                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
  1567→                    maimai_id=data.get("maimai_id", ""),
  1568→                    name=data.get("name", ""),
  1569→                    title=data.get("title", ""),
  1570→                    company=data.get("company", ""),
  1571→                    location=data.get("location", ""),
  1572→                    profile_url=data.get("profile_url", ""),
  1573→                ))
  1574→
  1575→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
  1576→        logger.info(f"Talent bank: extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
  1577→
  1578→    except Exception as e:
  1579→        logger.error(f"Error extracting talent bank results: {e}")
  1580→
  1581→    return candidates
  1582→
  1583→
  1584→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1585→# Recruit Manage path (Path D) — for standard paid accounts
  1586→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1587→
  1588→RECRUIT_MANAGE_URL_MARKER = "search_v2"
  1589→
  1590→# Year range tags the UI offers
  1591→_YEAR_RANGES = [
  1592→    (1, "1-3年"),
  1593→    (3, "3-5年"),
  1594→    (5, "5-10年"),
  1595→    (10, "10年以上"),
  1596→]
  1597→
  1598→
  1599→async def search_candidates_recruit_manage(
  1600→    keywords: str,
  1601→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
  1602→    pages: int = 1,
  1603→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
  1604→    min_years: Optional[int] = None,
  1605→    max_years: Optional[int] = None,
  1606→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1607→    """Search for candidates via the recruit_manage path (Path D).
  1608→
  1609→    For standard paid accounts without enterprise/talent_bank access.
  1610→    Navigates same-tab: homepage → #recruiter_manage → search_v2 page.
  1611→    Uses structured filters (keyword, position, city, years, company preset tags).
  1612→    Candidate card layout matches enterprise, so reuses _extract_enterprise_results().
  1613→
  1614→    Args:
  1615→        keywords: Search keywords
  1616→        company: Preset company tag names to click (e.g. ("TMDJ", "阿里"))
  1617→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
  1618→        browser: Browser manager instance
  1619→        min_years: Minimum work years filter (multi-selects all ranges >= min_years)
  1620→        max_years: Maximum work years threshold (excludes ranges with threshold > max_years)
  1621→
  1622→    Returns:
  1623→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1624→    """
  1625→    validate_keywords(keywords)
  1626→
  1627→    if browser is None:
  1628→        browser = get_browser_manager()
  1629→
  1630→    config = get_config()
  1631→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
  1632→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
  1633→
  1634→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
  1635→
  1636→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
  1637→    seen_ids: set = set()
  1638→
  1639→    with Progress(
  1640→        SpinnerColumn(),
  1641→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
  1642→        console=console,
  1643→    ) as progress:
  1644→        task = progress.add_task("Opening recruit manage...", total=None)
  1645→
  1646→        try:
  1647→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
  1648→
  1649→            page = browser.page
  1650→
  1651→            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage, click 招聘管理 link
  1652→            progress.update(task, description="Navigating to recruit manage...")
  1653→            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
  1654→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1655→
  1656→            entry_sel = config.get_selector("recruit_manage.entry_link")
  1657→            entry_link = await page.wait_for_selector(entry_sel, timeout=8000)
  1658→            if not entry_link:
  1659→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruit manage entry: {entry_sel}")
  1660→            await entry_link.click()
  1661→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1662→
  1663→            # Wait for search_v2 URL
  1664→            try:
  1665→                await page.wait_for_url(
  1666→                    lambda url: RECRUIT_MANAGE_URL_MARKER in url,
  1667→                    timeout=15000,
  1668→                )
  1669→            except Exception:
  1670→                logger.warning(f"search_v2 URL not matched, current: {page.url}")
  1671→
  1672→            await async_random_delay("action")
  1673→
  1674→            # Step 2: Add keyword filter
  1675→            progress.update(task, description=f"Adding keyword: {keywords}")
  1676→
  1677→            add_kw_sel = config.get_selector("recruit_manage.add_keyword_button")
  1678→            add_kw_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_kw_sel, timeout=5000)
  1679→            if add_kw_btn:
  1680→                await add_kw_btn.click()
  1681→                await async_random_delay("action")
  1682→
  1683→            kw_input_sel = config.get_selector("recruit_manage.keyword_input")
  1684→            await page.wait_for_selector(kw_input_sel, timeout=5000)
  1685→            await human_type(page, kw_input_sel, keywords)
  1686→            await async_random_delay("action")
  1687→
  1688→            kw_submit_sel = config.get_selector("recruit_manage.keyword_submit")
  1689→            submit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(kw_submit_sel, timeout=3000)
  1690→            if submit_btn:
  1691→                await submit_btn.click()
  1692→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1693→
  1694→            # Step 3: Set year filter if requested (multi-select ranges >= min_years and/or <= max_years)
  1695→            if min_years or max_years:
  1696→                year_desc = f"{min_years or 1}-{max_years or '∞'}yr"
  1697→                progress.update(task, description=f"Setting year filter: {year_desc}...")
  1698→                try:
  1699→                    add_years_sel = config.get_selector("recruit_manage.add_years_button")
  1700→                    years_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_years_sel, timeout=5000)
  1701→                    if years_btn:
  1702→                        await years_btn.click()
  1703→                        await async_random_delay("action")
  1704→
  1705→                        # Select year ranges >= min_years and/or <= max_years
  1706→                        # Open-ended ranges ("以上") are excluded when max_years is set
  1707→                        effective_min = min_years or 0
  1708→                        applicable = [
  1709→                            (threshold, label) for threshold, label in _YEAR_RANGES
  1710→                            if threshold >= effective_min and (
  1711→                                max_years is None or (threshold <= max_years and "以上" not in label)
  1712→                            )
  1713→                        ]
  1714→                        if not applicable:
  1715→                            applicable = [_YEAR_RANGES[-1]]  # fallback to 10年以上
  1716→
  1717→                        for i, (_, label) in enumerate(applicable):
  1718→                            if i > 0:
  1719→                                # Click the "+" button within the year section specifically
  1720→                                try:
  1721→                                    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
  1722→                                    clicked = await page.evaluate('''(title) => {
  1723→                                        const h4s = document.querySelectorAll('h4');
  1724→                                        for (const h4 of h4s) {
  1725→                                            if (h4.textContent.trim() === title) {
  1726→                                                const facet = h4.closest('[class*="facet___"]');
  1727→                                                const btn = facet && facet.querySelector('[class*="addConditionButton"]');
  1728→                                                if (btn) { btn.click(); return true; }
  1729→                                            }
  1730→                                        }
  1731→                                        return false;
  1732→                                    }''', '工作年限')
  1733→                                    if clicked:
  1734→                                        await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
  1735→                                    else:
  1736→                                        logger.debug(f"Could not find + button in year section for: {label}")
  1737→                                except Exception:
  1738→                                    logger.debug(f"Could not click add condition button for year: {label}")
  1739→
  1740→                            opt = await page.wait_for_selector(f"text='{label}'", timeout=5000)
  1741→                            if opt:
  1742→                                await opt.click()
  1743→                                await page.wait_for_timeout(800)  # wait for tag to settle
  1744→                                logger.info(f"Selected year filter: {label}")
  1745→                except Exception as e:
  1746→                    logger.warning(f"Failed to set year filter: {e}")
  1747→
  1748→            # Step 4: Set company filter if specified (preset tags)
  1749→            if company:
  1750→                progress.update(task, description="Adding company filter...")
  1751→                try:
  1752→                    add_co_sel = config.get_selector("recruit_manage.add_company_button")
  1753→                    add_co_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_co_sel, timeout=5000)
  1754→                    if add_co_btn:
  1755→                        await add_co_btn.click()
  1756→                        await async_random_delay("action")
  1757→
  1758→                    for i, co_name in enumerate(company):
  1759→                        if i > 0:
  1760→                            # Click the "+" button within the company section specifically
  1761→                            try:
  1762→                                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
  1763→                                clicked = await page.evaluate('''(title) => {
  1764→                                    const h4s = document.querySelectorAll('h4');
  1765→                                    for (const h4 of h4s) {
  1766→                                        if (h4.textContent.trim() === title) {
  1767→                                            const facet = h4.closest('[class*="facet___"]');
  1768→                                            const btn = facet && facet.querySelector('[class*="addConditionButton"]');
  1769→                                            if (btn) { btn.click(); return true; }
  1770→                                        }
  1771→                                    }
  1772→                                    return false;
  1773→                                }''', '就职公司')
  1774→                                if clicked:
  1775→                                    await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
  1776→                                else:
  1777→                                    logger.debug(f"Could not find + button in company section for: {co_name}")
  1778→                            except Exception:
  1779→                                logger.debug(f"Could not click add condition button for company: {co_name}")
  1780→
  1781→                        opt = await page.wait_for_selector(f"text='{co_name}'", timeout=5000)
  1782→                        if opt:
  1783→                            await opt.click()
  1784→                            await page.wait_for_timeout(800)  # wait for tag to settle
  1785→                            logger.info(f"Selected company filter: {co_name}")
  1786→                except Exception as e:
  1787→                    logger.warning(f"Failed to set company filter: {e}")
  1788→
  1789→            # Wait for results to load
  1790→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
  1791→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
  1792→
  1793→            # Step 5: Extract candidates (with pagination via scroll)
  1794→            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
  1795→                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
  1796→
  1797→                # Reuse enterprise extraction — same card layout
  1798→                candidates = await _extract_enterprise_results(page)
  1799→
  1800→                # Deduplicate across scroll pages
  1801→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
  1802→                for c in candidates:
  1803→                    seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
  1804→
  1805→                if not candidates:
  1806→                    logger.info(f"No recruit_manage results on page {page_num}")
  1807→                    break
  1808→
  1809→                # Filter non-R&D roles
  1810→                before_filter = len(candidates)
  1811→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
  1812→                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
  1813→                if filtered > 0:
  1814→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
  1815→
  1816→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
  1817→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
  1818→
  1819→                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
  1820→                    "keywords": keywords,
  1821→                    "page": page_num,
  1822→                    "results": len(candidates),
  1823→                    "mode": "recruit_manage",
  1824→                })
  1825→
  1826→                try:
  1827→                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
  1828→                except Exception as e:
  1829→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")
  1830→
  1831→                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
  1832→                if page_num < pages:
  1833→                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
  1834→                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
  1835→                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
  1836→
  1837→        except Exception as e:
  1838→            logger.error(f"Recruit manage search error: {e}")
  1839→            await browser.screenshot("recruit_manage_search_error")
  1840→            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
  1841→
  1842→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
  1843→
  1844→    console.print(f"[green]Recruit manage search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
  1845→    return all_candidates

1→"""Browser manager for Playwright automation.
     2→
     3→Provides a singleton browser manager that connects to an existing Chrome
     4→instance via CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol). Supports multi-tab management
     5→for workflows that open new tabs (e.g., enterprise recruitment).
     6→"""
     7→
     8→import asyncio
     9→from pathlib import Path
    10→from typing import List, Optional
    11→from datetime import datetime
    12→
    13→from patchright.async_api import async_playwright, Browser, BrowserContext, Page, Playwright
    14→from loguru import logger
    15→
    16→from src.utils.config import get_config, Config
    17→from src.core.session import SessionManager, get_session_manager
    18→from src.exceptions.errors import BrowserError
    19→
    20→
    21→class BrowserManager:
    22→    """
    23→    Singleton browser manager for Maimai automation.
    24→
    25→    Connects to a user-managed Chrome instance via CDP endpoint.
    26→    The user starts Chrome with --remote-debugging-port=9222 and logs in
    27→    manually. This manager connects/disconnects without closing Chrome.
    28→    """
    29→
    30→    _instance: Optional['BrowserManager'] = None
    31→    _lock: Optional[asyncio.Lock] = None
    32→    _lock_loop: Optional[asyncio.AbstractEventLoop] = None  # track which loop owns _lock
    33→
    34→    def __new__(cls, **kwargs):
    35→        if cls._instance is None:
    36→            cls._instance = super().__new__(cls)
    37→            cls._instance._initialized = False
    38→        return cls._instance
    39→
    40→    def __init__(
    41→        self,
    42→        config: Optional[Config] = None,
    43→        session_manager: Optional[SessionManager] = None,
    44→    ):
    45→        if self._initialized:
    46→            return
    47→
    48→        self._playwright: Optional[Playwright] = None
    49→        self._browser: Optional[Browser] = None
    50→        self._context: Optional[BrowserContext] = None
    51→        self._page: Optional[Page] = None
    52→        self._primary_page: Optional[Page] = None  # Original tab to return to
    53→        self._opened_tabs: List[Page] = []  # Tabs opened during our session
    54→        self._session_manager: SessionManager = session_manager or get_session_manager()
    55→        self._config: Config = config or get_config()
    56→        self._cdp_endpoint: Optional[str] = None
    57→        self._owned_page: bool = False  # True if we created the page (vs reusing existing)
    58→        self._initialized = True
    59→
    60→    @property
    61→    def is_running(self) -> bool:
    62→        """Check if browser is currently connected."""
    63→        return self._browser is not None and self._browser.is_connected()
    64→
    65→    @property
    66→    def page(self) -> Optional[Page]:
    67→        """Get current page instance."""
    68→        return self._page
    69→
    70→    @property
    71→    def context(self) -> Optional[BrowserContext]:
    72→        """Get current browser context."""
    73→        return self._context
    74→
    75→    @classmethod
    76→    def _ensure_lock(cls):
    77→        """Lazily create the asyncio.Lock inside a running event loop.
    78→
    79→        Recreates the lock if the event loop has changed (e.g. between
    80→        separate asyncio.run() calls) to avoid 'attached to a different
    81→        event loop' RuntimeError.
    82→        """
    83→        current_loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    84→        if cls._lock is None or cls._lock_loop is not current_loop:
    85→            cls._lock = asyncio.Lock()
    86→            cls._lock_loop = current_loop
    87→
    88→    def set_cdp_endpoint(self, endpoint: str) -> None:
    89→        """Override CDP endpoint (e.g. from CLI --cdp flag)."""
    90→        self._cdp_endpoint = endpoint
    91→
    92→    async def start(self) -> Page:
    93→        """
    94→        Connect to Chrome via CDP and return a page.
    95→
    96→        Returns:
    97→            Configured Playwright page instance
    98→
    99→        Raises:
   100→            BrowserError: If connection fails
   101→        """
   102→        self._ensure_lock()
   103→        async with self._lock:
   104→            if self.is_running:
   105→                logger.debug("Browser already connected, returning existing page")
   106→                return self._page
   107→
   108→            try:
   109→                # Determine CDP endpoint
   110→                endpoint = self._cdp_endpoint or self._config.get(
   111→                    'browser.cdp_endpoint', 'http://localhost:9222'
   112→                )
   113→                timeout = self._config.get('browser.timeout', 30000)
   114→
   115→                logger.info(f"Connecting to Chrome via CDP: {endpoint}")
   116→
   117→                # Start Playwright
   118→                self._playwright = await async_playwright().start()
   119→
   120→                # Connect to existing Chrome via CDP
   121→                self._browser = await self._playwright.chromium.connect_over_cdp(endpoint)
   122→
   123→                # Get the default context (the user's browser context with cookies)
   124→                contexts = self._browser.contexts
   125→                if contexts:
   126→                    self._context = contexts[0]
   127→                else:
   128→                    # Fallback: create a new context (shouldn't happen with CDP)
   129→                    logger.warning("No existing context found, creating new one")
   130→                    self._context = await self._browser.new_context()
   131→
   132→                # Set default timeout
   133→                self._context.set_default_timeout(timeout)
   134→
   135→                # Reuse existing page or create one
   136→                pages = self._context.pages
   137→                if pages:
   138→                    self._page = pages[0]
   139→                    self._owned_page = False
   140→                    logger.info(f"Reusing existing tab: {self._page.url}")
   141→                else:
   142→                    self._page = await self._context.new_page()
   143→                    self._owned_page = True
   144→                    logger.info("Created new tab")
   145→
   146→                # Remember the primary tab
   147→                self._primary_page = self._page
   148→                self._opened_tabs = []
   149→
   150→                logger.info("Connected to Chrome via CDP successfully")
   151→                return self._page
   152→
   153→            except Exception as e:
   154→                logger.error(f"Failed to connect to Chrome via CDP: {e}")
   155→                await self._close_internal()
   156→                raise BrowserError(
   157→                    f"Failed to connect to Chrome via CDP at {endpoint}. "
   158→                    f"Make sure Chrome is running with --remote-debugging-port=9222. "
   159→                    f"Error: {e}"
   160→                )
   161→
   162→    async def close(self) -> None:
   163→        """Disconnect from Chrome via CDP. Does NOT close the user's Chrome."""
   164→        self._ensure_lock()
   165→        async with self._lock:
   166→            await self._close_internal()
   167→
   168→    async def _close_internal(self) -> None:
   169→        """Actual cleanup logic — callable without acquiring _lock.
   170→
   171→        Must only be called while the lock is already held, or from
   172→        start()'s except block (which already holds the lock).
   173→        """
   174→        try:
   175→            # Close tabs we opened during the session
   176→            for tab in self._opened_tabs:
   177→                try:
   178→                    if not tab.is_closed():
   179→                        await tab.close()
   180→                except Exception:
   181→                    pass  # Tab may already be closed by user
   182→            self._opened_tabs = []
   183→
   184→            # Only close pages we created, not the user's existing tabs
   185→            if self._page and self._owned_page:
   186→                try:
   187→                    await self._page.close()
   188→                except Exception:
   189→                    pass  # Page may already be closed
   190→            self._page = None
   191→            self._primary_page = None
   192→            self._owned_page = False
   193→
   194→            # Don't close the context — it belongs to the user's Chrome
   195→            self._context = None
   196→
   197→            # browser.close() in CDP mode just disconnects, doesn't kill Chrome
   198→            if self._browser:
   199→                try:
   200→                    await self._browser.close()
   201→                except Exception as e:
   202→                    logger.error(f"Error closing browser connection: {e}")
   203→                finally:
   204→                    self._browser = None
   205→
   206→            if self._playwright:
   207→                try:
   208→                    await self._playwright.stop()
   209→                except Exception as e:
   210→                    logger.error(f"Error stopping Playwright: {e}")
   211→                finally:
   212→                    self._playwright = None
   213→
   214→            logger.info("Disconnected from Chrome (browser stays open)")
   215→
   216→        except Exception as e:
   217→            logger.error(f"Error disconnecting from Chrome: {e}")
   218→
   219→    async def wait_for_new_tab(self, timeout: int = 10000) -> Page:
   220→        """Wait for a click-triggered new tab, apply stealth, and switch to it.
   221→
   222→        Call this right after performing an action that opens a new tab
   223→        (e.g., clicking a link with target=_blank).
   224→
   225→        Args:
   226→            timeout: Max wait time in milliseconds
   227→
   228→        Returns:
   229→            The new Page instance (also set as the active page)
   230→
   231→        Raises:
   232→            BrowserError: If no new tab appears within timeout
   233→        """
   234→        if not self._context:
   235→            raise BrowserError("No active context for wait_for_new_tab")
   236→
   237→        try:
   238→            new_page = await self._context.wait_for_event(
   239→                "page", timeout=timeout
   240→            )
   241→            await new_page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded")
   242→            self._opened_tabs.append(new_page)
   243→            self._page = new_page
   244→            logger.info(f"New tab captured: {new_page.url}")
   245→            return new_page
   246→        except Exception as e:
   247→            raise BrowserError(f"No new tab opened within {timeout}ms: {e}")
   248→
   249→    def switch_to_primary_tab(self) -> Page:
   250→        """Switch back to the original (primary) tab.
   251→
   252→        Returns:
   253→            The primary Page instance
   254→        """
   255→        if not self._primary_page or self._primary_page.is_closed():
   256→            raise BrowserError("Primary tab is not available")
   257→
   258→        self._page = self._primary_page
   259→        logger.debug(f"Switched to primary tab: {self._page.url}")
   260→        return self._page
   261→
   262→    async def close_current_tab(self) -> Page:
   263→        """Close the current active tab and switch to the previous one.
   264→
   265→        Will not close the primary tab. After closing, switches to the
   266→        most recent remaining tab or falls back to the primary tab.
   267→
   268→        Returns:
   269→            The page that became active after closing
   270→
   271→        Raises:
   272→            BrowserError: If trying to close the primary tab
   273→        """
   274→        if not self._page:
   275→            raise BrowserError("No active page to close")
   276→
   277→        if self._page == self._primary_page:
   278→            raise BrowserError("Cannot close the primary tab")
   279→
   280→        closing = self._page
   281→        try:
   282→            # Remove from opened_tabs tracking
   283→            if closing in self._opened_tabs:
   284→                self._opened_tabs.remove(closing)
   285→            await closing.close()
   286→        except Exception as e:
   287→            logger.warning(f"Error closing tab: {e}")
   288→
   289→        # Switch to previous tab
   290→        if self._context and self._context.pages:
   291→            self._page = self._context.pages[-1]
   292→        else:
   293→            self._page = self._primary_page
   294→
   295→        logger.debug(f"Closed tab, switched to: {self._page.url if self._page else 'none'}")
   296→        return self._page
   297→
   298→    async def save_session(self) -> None:
   299→        """Save current session to disk (backup of cookies)."""
   300→        if self._context:
   301→            await self._session_manager.save(self._context)
   302→        else:
   303→            logger.warning("No active context to save session from")
   304→
   305→    async def screenshot(self, name: str = None) -> str:
   306→        """
   307→        Take a screenshot of current page.
   308→
   309→        Args:
   310→            name: Screenshot name (timestamp used if None)
   311→
   312→        Returns:
   313→            Path to saved screenshot
   314→        """
   315→        if not self._page:
   316→            raise BrowserError("No active page for screenshot")
   317→
   318→        screenshot_dir = Path(self._config.get('data.screenshot_dir', 'data/screenshots'))
   319→        screenshot_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   320→
   321→        if name is None:
   322→            name = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   323→
   324→        filepath = screenshot_dir / f"{name}.png"
   325→
   326→        await self._page.screenshot(path=str(filepath), full_page=True)
   327→        logger.info(f"Screenshot saved: {filepath}")
   328→
   329→        return str(filepath)
   330→
   331→
   332→
   333→# Global browser manager instance
   334→_browser_manager: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
   335→
   336→
   337→def get_browser_manager() -> BrowserManager:
   338→    """Get global browser manager instance."""
   339→    global _browser_manager
   340→    if _browser_manager is None:
   341→        _browser_manager = BrowserManager()
   342→    return _browser_manager
   343→

1→"""Session management for persistent browser sessions.
     2→
     3→Handles saving and loading browser sessions (cookies, localStorage)
     4→to enable resuming without re-login.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→import json
     8→import os
     9→import stat
    10→import tempfile
    11→from pathlib import Path
    12→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    13→from typing import Optional
    14→
    15→from cryptography.fernet import Fernet
    16→from patchright.async_api import BrowserContext
    17→from loguru import logger
    18→
    19→from src.utils.config import get_config
    20→
    21→
    22→class SessionManager:
    23→    """Manages browser session persistence."""
    24→
    25→    def __init__(self, session_path: Optional[str] = None):
    26→        """
    27→        Initialize session manager.
    28→
    29→        Args:
    30→            session_path: Path to session file. Uses config default if None.
    31→        """
    32→        if session_path is None:
    33→            config = get_config()
    34→            session_path = config.get('data.session_path', 'data/.session/maimai_session.json')
    35→
    36→        self.session_path = Path(session_path)
    37→        self._key_path = self.session_path.parent / '.session_key'
    38→        self._fernet: Optional[Fernet] = None
    39→        self._ensure_session_dir()
    40→
    41→    def _ensure_session_dir(self) -> None:
    42→        """Ensure session directory exists with restrictive permissions."""
    43→        session_dir = self.session_path.parent
    44→        session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    45→        # Restrict directory to owner only (rwx------)
    46→        try:
    47→            os.chmod(session_dir, stat.S_IRWXU)
    48→        except OSError:
    49→            logger.warning("Could not set restrictive permissions on session directory")
    50→
    51→    def _get_fernet(self) -> Fernet:
    52→        """Get or create Fernet encryption instance."""
    53→        if self._fernet is not None:
    54→            return self._fernet
    55→
    56→        if self._key_path.exists():
    57→            key = self._key_path.read_bytes().strip()
    58→        else:
    59→            key = Fernet.generate_key()
    60→            # Write key with owner-only permissions
    61→            fd = os.open(str(self._key_path), os.O_WRONLY | os.O_CREAT | os.O_TRUNC, 0o600)
    62→            try:
    63→                os.write(fd, key)
    64→            finally:
    65→                os.close(fd)
    66→
    67→        self._fernet = Fernet(key)
    68→        return self._fernet
    69→
    70→    def _decrypt_session_data(self) -> dict:
    71→        """Decrypt and parse the stored session file.
    72→
    73→        Returns:
    74→            Parsed session data dict.
    75→
    76→        Raises:
    77→            Exception: If decryption or JSON parsing fails.
    78→        """
    79→        encrypted = self.session_path.read_bytes()
    80→        plaintext = self._get_fernet().decrypt(encrypted)
    81→        return json.loads(plaintext.decode('utf-8'))
    82→
    83→    def _write_secure(self, path: Path, data: bytes) -> None:
    84→        """Atomically write data to file with owner-only permissions (0600).
    85→
    86→        Writes to a temp file first, then renames to target path so that
    87→        a crash mid-write never corrupts the existing file.
    88→        """
    89→        tmp_fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(dir=str(path.parent), suffix=".tmp")
    90→        try:
    91→            os.write(tmp_fd, data)
    92→            os.close(tmp_fd)
    93→            tmp_fd = -1  # mark as closed
    94→            os.chmod(tmp_path, 0o600)
    95→            os.replace(tmp_path, str(path))
    96→        except BaseException:
    97→            if tmp_fd >= 0:
    98→                os.close(tmp_fd)
    99→            try:
   100→                os.unlink(tmp_path)
   101→            except OSError:
   102→                pass
   103→            raise
   104→
   105→    async def save(self, context: BrowserContext) -> None:
   106→        """
   107→        Save browser session state.
   108→
   109→        Args:
   110→            context: Playwright browser context
   111→        """
   112→        try:
   113→            # Get storage state (cookies + localStorage)
   114→            storage_state = await context.storage_state()
   115→
   116→            # Add metadata
   117→            session_data = {
   118→                'saved_at': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
   119→                'storage_state': storage_state
   120→            }
   121→
   122→            # Encrypt and write with restrictive permissions
   123→            plaintext = json.dumps(session_data, ensure_ascii=False).encode('utf-8')
   124→            encrypted = self._get_fernet().encrypt(plaintext)
   125→            self._write_secure(self.session_path, encrypted)
   126→
   127→            logger.info(f"Session saved (encrypted) to {self.session_path}")
   128→
   129→        except Exception as e:
   130→            logger.error(f"Failed to save session: {e}")
   131→            raise
   132→
   133→    async def clear(self) -> None:
   134→        """Clear saved session and encryption key."""
   135→        if self.session_path.exists():
   136→            self.session_path.unlink()
   137→            logger.info("Session cleared")
   138→
   139→        # Also clear storage state file if exists
   140→        state_path = self.session_path.parent / 'storage_state.json'
   141→        if state_path.exists():
   142→            state_path.unlink()
   143→
   144→        # Remove encryption key so a fresh one is generated next time
   145→        if self._key_path.exists():
   146→            self._key_path.unlink()
   147→        self._fernet = None
   148→
   149→
   150→
   151→# Global session manager instance
   152→_session_manager = None
   153→
   154→
   155→def get_session_manager() -> SessionManager:
   156→    """Get global session manager instance."""
   157→    global _session_manager
   158→    if _session_manager is None:
   159→        _session_manager = SessionManager()
   160→    return _session_manager
   161→
